LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HAMILTON MATERIALS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED THAT HE WORKED WITH ROOFING PRODUCTS AND DEFENDANT FAILED TO PRESENT COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT IT DID NOT MAKE SUCH PRODUCTS. ASSUMING THE BURDEN WAS SHIFTED, PLAINTIFF PRESENTED TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT BASED ON THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFF AND COHEN. PLAINTIFF MUST HAVE SIGNED HIS DECLARATION BY THE TIME OF THE HEARING. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED EXCEPT AS TO EXHIBIT C. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SUBMITTED A DECLARATION OF JOHN TEMPLIN AND THEREFORE, DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS ARE WITHOUT MERIT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HAMILTON MATERIALS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: LAUREL HALBANY, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. KURT PUTNAM, ESQUIRE (WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & MCCALL, 415.781.7072) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED THAT HE WORKED WITH ROOFING PRODUCTS AND DEFENDANT FAILED TO PRESENT COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT IT DID NOT MAKE SUCH PRODUCTS. ASSUMING THE BURDEN WAS SHIFTED, PLAINTIFF PRESENTED TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT BASED ON THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFF AND COHEN. PLAINTIFF MUST HAVE SIGNED HIS DECLARATION BY THE TIME OF THE HEARING. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED EXCEPT AS TO EXHIBIT C. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SUBMITTED A DECLARATION OF JOHN TEMPLIN AND THEREFORE, DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS ARE WITHOUT MERIT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR 11332
